zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Pomeroy於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易時，他的父親Henry De La Pomerai1歲，母親Alice Redvers14歲。他於大約1225年與Margery de Vernon在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他去世於1220年在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Pomeroy was born about 1180, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry De La Pomerai, was 1 and his mother, Alice Redvers, was 14. He married Margery de Vernon about 1225, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1220, in Jerusalem, Palestine, at the age of 41.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Pomeroyが約1180年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで生まれた時，父Henry De La Pomeraiは1歳，母Alice Redversは14歳であった。約1225年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMargery de Vernonと結婚した。彼は1220年にパレスチナジャーウサレムで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Pomeroy(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De La Pomerai(은)는 1세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Redvers(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Margery de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1220년 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Pomeroy родился около 1180 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry De La Pomerai было 1 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Redvers, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Vernon около 1225 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности джирсеилем, Палестина в возрасте 41 год.
